text: Email: Epstein arranges meeting with Caroline Lang at Grand Palais, Paris — Oct 16, 2012
Epstein emails Tom Pritzker to arrange invitation to the Pritzker Prize in Beijing, Feb 2012
Epstein confirms he will be in Paris on Jan 26, 2013 — correspondence corroboration
Epstein or associate visited BDV DECO furniture showroom in France; luxury desk and sculpture discussed in follow-up correspondence.
Woody Allen film screening planned at Epstein's 71st Street townhouse with theater setup arranged.
